# SOURCE-HFYIC — How to Find Your Ideal Customer

> **Pessoa:** Dan Kennedy
> **Código:** HFYIC
> **Tipo:** GKIC SEMINAR (live evening workshop)
> **Tema:** Whale Hunting — Finding, Defining, and Attracting High-Value Customers
> **Data Processamento:** 2026-03-16
> **Elementos Extraídos:** 66

---

## CONTEÚDO

Dan Kennedy's evening seminar on systematically identifying, targeting, and attracting the highest-value customers ("whales") for any business. Covers the complete framework from whale definition through intelligence gathering, positioning, and outreach.
